title: Subtract (2) from (1). Multiply (1) by $$3$$ and (3) by $$2$$ and then add (1) and (3).
You should have $$8x+3z=-1$$ (4) and $$23x+22z=21$$ (5). Mutliply (4) by $$22$$ and (5) by $$3$$, then subtract 3(5) from 22(4) to get $$x$$.
Using $$x$$, plug back into (4) and solve for $$z$$. Using $$x$$ and $$z$$, plug back into (2) and solve for $$y$$.
